SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC., REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER, LEGAL EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
